indication: Statin-intolerant CAD, LDL 132 post-MI, secondary prevention per ACC guidelines

stageHistory.note: PA submitted with diagnosis codes I21.4 (recent MI), Z91.13 (statin intolerance), and lipid panel showing LDL 132 on max-tolerated atorvastatin.
Auto-acknowledgment received. Estimated review: 7 business days.
Initial denial — documentation insufficient. Insurance requires documented trial of two statins at maximum tolerated dose with persistent LDL >70.

artifacts.summary: Denial letter cites insufficient statin trial documentation

stageHistory.note: Appeal submitted with full statin trial history (atorvastatin 80→40→10 due to myalgia, prior rosuvastatin trial also d/c for myalgia 2y ago) and updated LDL.

artifacts.summary: Appeal with full statin intolerance documentation

stageHistory.note: Appeal received. Insurance requesting CK levels at time of myalgia and proof of provider counseling on lifestyle modification.

artifacts.summary: Info request — CK + lifestyle counseling documentation

latestPatientCommunication.body: I still haven't gotten my Repatha shot. The pharmacy keeps saying it's not approved yet. It's been almost 2 weeks. I sent the Walgreens Springfield address again. Can someone please tell me what is going on with my insurance? I am worried about my heart.
